description: Canonical parameter dictionary for discrete power MOSFETs, covering enhancement-mode N-channel and P-channel devices. Demonstrates that the datasheet schema is family-agnostic: the same measurement envelope, condition model, and provenance serve a discrete transistor as well as a linear regulator. Condition axes for this family include V_GS, V_DS, I_D, T_J, and T_C. Aliases normalize the printed datasheet symbols.

parameters.name: Drain-source voltage
parameters.hint: The absolute-maximum drain-to-source voltage, the headline voltage rating. Store as absolute_max. The breakdown voltage V(BR)DSS is the characterized counterpart.

parameters.name: Gate-source voltage
parameters.hint: Maximum gate-source voltage, typically a symmetric limit such as +/-20 V. Store as absolute_max, using min and max in the value.

parameters.name: Continuous drain current
parameters.hint: Continuous drain current, strongly case-temperature dependent, so specify T_C (often 25 degC and 100 degC). May be package-limited below the silicon capability.

parameters.name: Pulsed drain current
parameters.hint: Peak pulsed drain current, pulse width and duty cycle limited.

parameters.name: Single-pulse avalanche energy
parameters.hint: Single-pulse avalanche energy, specified with the test inductance and starting current.

parameters.name: Power dissipation
parameters.hint: Maximum power dissipation, derated with case temperature.

parameters.name: Gate threshold voltage
parameters.hint: Gate-source threshold, measured at a small drain current with VDS = VGS. Give min, typ, max where published, with the I_D and T_J conditions.

parameters.name: Static drain-source on-resistance
parameters.hint: On-resistance, strongly gate-drive dependent, so emit one entry per V_GS point (for example 10 V and 4.5 V), each with its I_D and T_J conditions. This is the defining figure of merit for a switching MOSFET.

parameters.name: Zero-gate-voltage drain current
parameters.hint: Drain leakage at VGS = 0 and VDS at or near the rating, at stated T_J.

parameters.name: Gate-source leakage current
parameters.hint: Gate leakage at maximum VGS with VDS = 0. Often a symmetric +/- bound.

parameters.name: Input capacitance
parameters.hint: Ciss = Cgs + Cgd, measured at a stated VDS, VGS = 0, and test frequency.

parameters.name: Output capacitance
parameters.hint: Coss = Cds + Cgd, at a stated VDS.

parameters.name: Reverse transfer capacitance
parameters.hint: Crss = Cgd, the Miller capacitance that governs switching speed.

parameters.name: Total gate charge
parameters.hint: Total gate charge, at stated VDS, I_D, and drive VGS. Store in coulombs (a 10 nC figure is 1e-8 C).

parameters.name: Turn-on delay time
parameters.hint: Resistive-load switching times are specified together at one VDS, I_D, VGS, and Rg. Store in seconds (a 7 ns figure is 7e-9 s).

parameters.name: Body-diode forward voltage
parameters.hint: Forward voltage of the intrinsic body diode at a stated forward current and T_J.

parameters.name: Thermal resistance, junction to case
parameters.hint: Junction-to-case thermal resistance. The unit is degC/W, equivalently K/W.

parameters.name: Thermal resistance, junction to ambient
parameters.hint: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance, board and copper-area dependent, so record the stated mounting condition in the measurement conditions.

parameters.name: Operating junction temperature range
parameters.hint: Recommended operating junction temperature range. Store as recommended, with min and max in the value.

parameters.name: Storage temperature range
parameters.hint: Absolute-maximum storage temperature range.
